language.headline: Let's start with the <1>easy bit</1>.
language.description: Hi, I'm <1>Shiro</1>. I'll walk you through six short steps — about a minute. You can change anything later in settings.
language.title: Interface language
language.hint: Polish only for now. More languages soon.
language.footnote: ✦ More languages will arrive in future updates

name.headline: What should I <1>call</1> you?
name.description: I'll use this name in the new-tab greeting and anywhere the app talks to you. You can skip this step and change it later in settings.
name.title: Your name
name.hint: Nickname, short form, whatever fits. Stays only on your device.
name.footnote: ✦ If you leave this blank and connect AniList, Shiro will use your nick from there

theme.headline: Pick a <1>palette</1> that suits when you watch.
theme.description: Dark themes work well at night. <1>Paper</1> is gentler on the eyes in the morning. Switch any time, it saves instantly.
theme.title: Themes

background.headline: Set the <1>mood</1>: your favourite key art in the background.
background.description: Drop in an image or GIF and we'll blur it behind your library and schedule. Or stick with the default: <1>no background</1>.
background.title: App background

dock.headline: Where to <1>put</1> the dock? Within reach, out of the way.
dock.description: The floating icon pill sits at the bottom by default, but you can pin it to any edge. Live preview on the right.
dock.title: Dock

autoHide.title: Auto-hide
autoHide.description: Collapses to an icon, expands on hover

draggable.title: Draggable
draggable.description: Reposition the dock by dragging it

discord.headline: Show your friends <1>what you're watching</1>.
discord.description: ShiroAni can show your current episode on your Discord profile. Visibility helps small projects, but if you'd rather stay private, leave this off.
discord.title: Rich Presence

toggle.title: Enable integration
toggle.description: Show ShiroAni activity on your profile

discord.footnote: ✦ You can customise status templates later in settings

adblock.headline: Last bit: a <1>clean</1> episode without ads.
adblock.description: The built-in browser blocks ads and trackers on streaming sites (<1>EasyList + EasyPrivacy</1>). Set per-domain exceptions later.
adblock.title: Ad blocking
adblock.footnote: ✦ Add exceptions later in browser settings

summary.headline: All <1>set</1>. Time to watch.
summary.description: Seven settings down, all stored locally on your machine. <1>Shiro-chan</1> will be at the bottom of the screen if you need her.
summary.title: All ready!
summary.intro: Here are your choices. Change any of them later in settings.
